underlying_goal: Set up Claude Code workspace by creating a CLAUDE.md file and installing various plugins
friction_detail: User interrupted Claude's codebase analysis before it could complete the CLAUDE.md file, then spent the rest of the session installing plugins via local commands.
brief_summary: User asked for a CLAUDE.md file to be created but interrupted Claude early, then spent the entire session installing ~25+ plugins via local commands without further interaction with Claude.
